text.title: Release QA Cycle Template Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: Release v2.4 cycle: strategy (alice, pass), smoke (bob, pass), bug-bash (carol, pass with S2 followups), perf (dave, FAIL initially; held), perf re-run (dave, pass), rollback-triggers (eve, pass), go-no-go (frank, go). Retro: smoke pack speed kept; bug-bash kickoff earlier next cycle.

section.title: Resulting artefact
section.code: { "cycle_id": "rel-2026-05-23-v2.4", "release_id": "v2.4.0", "stages": [ { "id": "strategy", "owner": "alice", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/strategy.md" }, { "id": "smoke", "owner": "bob", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/smoke.yaml" }, { "id": "bug_bash", "owner": "carol", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/bug-bash-ledger.csv" }, { "id": "perf", "owner": "dave", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/perf-verdict.json" }, { "id": "rollback_triggers", "owner": "eve", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/rollback-canon.yaml" }, { "id": "go_no_go", "owner": "frank", "outcome": "pass", "waiver_reason": null, "artefact_link": "release/v2.4/go-no-go.md" } ], "decision": "go", "approver": "frank", "retro_note": "keep: smoke pack speed; change: bug-bash needs earlier kickoff.", "recorded_at": "2026-05-23T16:00:00Z" }

section.title: Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
